metadata.name: Commander tax accumulates on recasts from command zone
metadata.description: p1's commander Llanowar Elves has been cast once from the command zone and died, returning to the command zone. p1 casts it again. The commander tax adds {2} to the cost, making the total cost {1}{G} + {2} = {3}{G}. Tests that the commander tax correctly increases by {2} for each previous cast from the command zone (CR 903.8).
metadata.generation_notes: CR 903.8: commander tax adds {2} for each previous time the commander was cast from the command zone. Llanowar Elves costs {G} normally. After 1 prior cast, tax = {2}, total = {2}{G}. We set times_cast_from_command_zone = 1 in initial state. p1 casts with {2}{G} (extra {2} for tax). The engine validates commander tax correctly. Initial: Llanowar Elves in command zone, times_cast = 1; p1 has {2}{G} in mana pool.

script.step_note: p1 casts their commander Llanowar Elves for the second time, paying {2} extra tax.

actions.description: Initial: Llanowar Elves in command zone, p1 has {3}{G} in pool (including tax)
actions.note: Commander is in command zone. Has been cast once before (tax = {2}).
CR 903.8: p1 casts Llanowar Elves from command zone. Base cost {G} + commander tax {2} = {2}{G}. Pays {2}{G} total.

resolution.note: Llanowar Elves enters battlefield under p1's control.

actions.description: After cast: Llanowar Elves on battlefield
actions.note: Commander successfully cast with tax and entered battlefield.
